project_goal: AI-OS.NET — AI-Native Linux operating system: 10-revision roadmap (Rev.1-3 complete, Rev.4-10 engineering). 48 Rust modules in aios-capability-runtime (~30,000 lines). Built on 12-OS research benchmark.
current_milestone: Rev.3 Complete — all 8 waves R3-W1 through R3-W8 executed. 7 OS-RESEARCH value-add modules + 26 R3 hardening modules + 15 pre-existing modules = 48 total. 578 tests passing.
